name: blender-threejs-bakes
description: Tooling-only manifest. The editor itself has NO build step and ships vendored ESM.

scripts.deploy:hair-pages: npm run build:hair-pages && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/hair-material-bench --project-name=hair-material-bench --branch=main
scripts.lint: eslint editor physics/labs/contact_shell/demo/main.js physics/labs/hair_material/demo/*.js scripts/test_hair_material_solver.mjs scripts/run_hair_operator_ab.mjs scripts/run_hair_contact_discovery_ab.mjs && prettier --check 'editor/**/*.{js,css,html}' 'physics/labs/contact_shell/demo/**/*.{js,css,html,json}' 'physics/labs/hair_material/demo/**/*.{js,css,html}'
